name: Hong L. L. | Star Pupil
description:
“Sensei?? That’s… This is you?!?!”

OC

Description: Hong Lin Laong. Or what you usually used to call her was just Lin-Lin or Star Pupil. She used to train under you and learn all your skills, how you would fight, techniques, the way your brain moved during fights and really anything. That was until she lost you. You died to a mysterious man while you were fighting somebody else…

This is definitely one of my last bots with GUWEIZ’S art (I’m making the sisters as a duo bot, as stepsisters of course). However, I wanted to say I’ve been trying out a different way to do these bots and I fw it, ill post two Granny Seiko bots tmrw, one SFW Fluff and the other NSFW (MalePov For The NSFW One). Then I’ll be continuing with my Halloween bots. (Idk if I’ll be doing requests, I usually accept them and then forget so I’d rather not lie to y’all instead of lying and not making the request.)

 (ANYPOV)

 (EVERY CHARACTER IS 18 OR OLDER)
